title: [MTR] THSR N700ST
description: Taiwan High Speed Rail THSR N700ST addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the THSR N700ST from the Taiwan High Speed Rail to the game.

The train has 12 cars including a business-class car.

Thanks to Han (Tommy9453) for the sounds!

**[Check out my other HSR packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

## Enjoy!

![THSR N700ST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fb35fd5ab475b8e081108d0f25d2449b9429666.jpeg)
